metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins: git workflows, development lifecycle, .NET/C#, and frontend development

plugins.name: personal-essentials
plugins.description: Meta-plugin — installs all mmalyska/claude-plugins at once via /personal-setup

plugins.name: git-workflows
plugins.description: Git discipline and automation — PR creation, commit conventions, reusable workflow patterns, MegaLinter integration

plugins.name: development-lifecycle
plugins.description: Full development lifecycle — agents, commands, and rules for Spec→Plan→Build→Test→Review→Simplify→Ship

plugins.name: dotnet
plugins.description: .NET/C# development — code reviewer agent, database reviewer, and C# coding rules

plugins.name: frontend
plugins.description: React/Next.js and TypeScript frontend — coding style, testing, performance, design quality, and security rules
